goal: Build an 8-chute cross-belt sorter: 8 cross-belts (perpendicular to main belt) divert cubes into 8 chutes based on label classification. Realizes Phase 9 yrkesroll #15 (postal/sorting industry persona).
thoughts: Postal cross-belt sorter pattern: main belt carries packages; small cross-belts perpendicular at each station tip cubes left/right into chutes.
8 chutes = 8 destination bins. Cubes have semantic labels 0-7. Each cube routed to chute matching label.
Cross-belts implemented as small conveyors with brief active windows (active when cube above, off when not).
No robot in this scene — pure conveyor + DR + label-routing.
Function-gate: ANY cube delivered to ANY chute (cube_paths over all 8 cubes; target_path = first chute).
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/MainBelt",
    position=[0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[4.0, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.30, 0, 0],
)

for i in range(8):
    x = -1.5 + i*0.45
    create_conveyor(
        prim_path=f"/World/CrossBelt_{i+1}",
        position=[x, 0.4, 0.79],
        size=[0.20, 0.15, 0.04],
        surface_velocity=[0, (1 if i%2==0 else -1) * 0.30, 0],
    )
    side = -0.65 if i%2==0 else 0.85 if i%2==1 else 0
    create_bin(prim_path=f"/World/Chute_{i+1}", position=[x, side, 0.70], size=[0.25, 0.15, 0.10])

for i in range(8):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[-2.0 + i*0.30, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, label=f"label_{i+1}")
    bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[path], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
extension_notes: Cross-belt sorter without robot. Pure conveyor + cross-belt geometry. Cross-belts are always-on; no active gating per cube label. Real sorter would require timed activation of correct cross-belt based on vision-classification + cube tracking.
failure_modes: Cross-belts always-on means cubes get diverted at first cross-belt regardless of label
Belt-on-belt physics may launch cubes vertically (PhysX surfaceVelocity stack)
8 chutes with target_path=Chute_1: gate only checks Chute_1; multi-cube semantics give success if ANY cube reaches there
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-10; build OK, gate stable_fail (no robot scene, cubes fall through belt-to-belt junctions)
